channel.title: Nayantharafanmade — Fan News
channel.description: Community-curated news and updates about actress Nayanthara, from the unofficial Nayantharafanmade fan tribute site.

item.title: New project announcement excites fans
item.description: The fan community rounds up reactions to the latest project announcement.

item.title: Red carpet look breakdown
item.description: A closer look at a recent standout appearance and styling choices.

item.title: Fan edits of the month
item.description: Highlighting the most creative fan-made edits shared this month.
